Speaking Assessment

Perfect Your English
Speaking Skills

Our AI-powered speaking assessment uses advanced speech recognition to evaluate your pronunciation, fluency, and coherence. Speak naturally and receive instant, detailed feedback on your English speaking proficiency.

Advanced AI Technology

Speaking Assessment Features

Our cutting-edge AI technology provides comprehensive speaking evaluation that goes beyond simple pronunciation checks.

AI Speech Recognition

Advanced neural networks transcribe and analyze your speech in real-time, capturing every nuance of your pronunciation and intonation patterns.

Pronunciation Scoring

Receive precise scores for individual phonemes, word stress, and sentence-level intonation, mapped to CEFR proficiency descriptors.

Fluency Analysis

Our AI measures speaking rate, pauses, hesitations, and self-corrections to assess your fluency and natural rhythm in English conversation.

Real-Time Feedback

Get instant visual and textual feedback as you speak, with highlighted areas for improvement and suggestions for more natural expression.

Simple Process

How It Works

Our speaking assessment is designed to be intuitive and straightforward. Follow three simple steps to receive your comprehensive evaluation.

01

Record Your Voice

Read prompts and answer questions using your microphone. Our interface guides you through various speaking tasks designed for your target CEFR level.

02

AI Analyzes Speech

Our advanced AI processes your audio in real-time, evaluating pronunciation accuracy, fluency patterns, grammatical structures, and vocabulary usage.

03

Get Detailed Feedback

Receive a comprehensive report with your CEFR speaking level, pronunciation scores, fluency metrics, and personalized recommendations for improvement.

Speaking Assessment

Ready to Test Your Speaking?

Discover your English speaking proficiency level with our AI-powered assessment. Get detailed feedback on pronunciation, fluency, and coherence in minutes.
